jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Sharekhan
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Sharekhan in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sharekhan:
Sharekhan is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan!
